title: Pentaschistis thunbergii
taxonomy: Pentaschistis thunbergii is classified as a species of grass within the family Poaceae. It belongs to the genus Pentaschistis, which is a group of grasses native to the southern hemisphere. The species is further classified as a member of the subfamily Danthonioideae. Pentaschistis thunbergii is a tufted perennial grass that is commonly found in grasslands and mountainous regions. Its classification is often used in botanical and ecological studies to understand its distribution and characteristics.
